headline: Standardizing Agentic Workflows With Superpowers
lede: Moving beyond ad-hoc prompts, Superpowers introduces a rigid engineering framework for autonomous agents. By enforcing test-driven development and structured planning, it transitions AI from mere generation to reliable software execution.

headline: Recreate Complex Software From Scratch
lede: Master the internals of databases, containers, and 3D renderers through these hands-on engineering tutorials. This curated collection replaces abstract documentation with the raw experience of building foundational technology.

headline: GitNexus Maps Codebases Into Interactive Graphs
lede: Transform stagnant code into a searchable knowledge graph using LadybugDB and Tree-sitter. This engine provides LLMs with essential architectural awareness, ensuring that automated refactoring remains grounded in your project's specific dependency chain.

headline: Deploy Production-Grade Autonomous Systems With Deep Agents
lede: Built on the robust LangGraph ecosystem, this framework provides a ready-to-run harness for complex agentic workflows. It prioritizes stability and state management, offering a scalable path for teams ready to move past experimental prototypes.

headline: Monitor Claude Code Sessions With Real-Time HUD
lede: Stop flying blind with your AI coding agents by integrating a lightweight, terminal-based monitoring layer. This tool visualizes token usage and task progress, giving developers immediate oversight of their automated coding pipeline.

headline: Run WebAssembly Services Locally With Workerd
lede: The engine powering Cloudflare Workers is now available for your own infrastructure. By leveraging a high-performance V8 runtime, this tool enables complex, capability-based microservices with the efficiency of local function execution.

headline: Project Traction And Ecosystem Expansion
lede: Open source velocity remains the primary metric for developer adoption. This project marks a significant shift in community engagement as contributors rally around new architectural standards.

headline: Foundational Computing Resources For Modern Engineers
lede: True engineering literacy requires understanding the underlying theory that defines modern software stacks. This archive curates essential tutorials and research, providing a permanent reference for engineers tackling complex system design.

headline: Testing New Interfaces For Agent Collaboration
lede: We are sketching out new ways to visualize multi-agent interactions in this informal prototype repository. These experiments favor raw utility and rapid iteration over established patterns, offering a playground for unconventional AI workflows.

headline: Securing Local-First Code Intelligence Environments
lede: Data privacy is non-negotiable when exposing private codebases to AI models. This project enforces local-first processing, ensuring that critical architectural insights never leave the host machine's secure boundary.
